blended.narrative: Boston Mills / Brandywine is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 62°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 69°F.
Tuesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
